data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures that the website layout adapts to various screen sizes and resolutions.
data.technical_spec: CSS3 media queries, flexible grid layout, adaptive images.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The site is structured in modular, independent units that can be developed and maintained separately.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Improves site speed and reliability by distributing content across a global network of servers.

data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Utilizes cloud services for scalability and efficiency in data management.
data.technical_spec: AWS, Google Cloud, or Apple’s own infrastructure.

data.title: Progressive Web App (PWA)
data.description: Aims to provide native app-like experiences on the web.
data.technical_spec: Service Workers, Web App Manifest, HTTPS.
